feed.title: The future of the Bitcoin Core GUI

entry.title: The future of the Bitcoin Core GUI
entry.summary: The Bitcoin Core App project is an ambitious initiative aimed at transforming the current QT GUI into a more modern, QML-based interface. This effort has already seen significant design and development advancements, albeit progressing gradually towards a potential experimental launch. The project has garnered positive reactions from the community, especially when showcased at events such as the BTC Prague conference last year. For those interested in exploring more about this innovative venture, detailed information and updates can be found through the provided resources at [Bitcoin Design Guide](https://bitcoin.design/guide/case-studies/bitcoin-core-app/) and the official [Bitcoin Core App website](https://bitcoincore.app). These platforms offer insights into the project's objectives, the progress made so far, and how it plans to enhance the user experience for Bitcoin Core users by leveraging the capabilities of QML technology.
